description: A named dataset grouping a batch of Darwin Core occurrence records uploaded together. Created during the tree upload wizard so users can manage and reference their uploads as cohesive units.

main.description: A user-named dataset representing a batch of uploaded occurrence records.

name.description: User-given name for the dataset (e.g. 'March 2025 Danum Valley Survey').

description.description: Optional description of the dataset contents, methodology, or purpose.

recordCount.description: Number of occurrence records in this dataset. Set after upload completes.

establishmentMeans.description: Batch-level establishment means for all records in this dataset. Uses the GBIF controlled vocabulary.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of dataset creation in the ATProto PDS.
